import boto3
import redis
from pymongo import MongoClient
from elasticsearch import Elasticsearch

S3_CLIENT = boto3.client("s3", region_name="us-east-1")
REDIS_CLIENT = redis.Redis(host="localhost", port=6379, db=0)
MONGO_CLIENT = MongoClient("mongodb://localhost:27017")
ES_CLIENT = Elasticsearch(["http://localhost:9200"])

def upload_file(bucket: str, key: str, data: bytes) -> None:
    S3_CLIENT.put_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key, Body=data)

def cache_set(key: str, value: str, ttl: int = 3600) -> None:
    REDIS_CLIENT.setex(key, ttl, value)

def insert_document(collection: str, doc: dict) -> None:
    MONGO_CLIENT["mydb"][collection].insert_one(doc)

def search_index(index: str, query: dict) -> dict:
    return ES_CLIENT.search(index=index, body=query)
